message:
test(fuzz): SessionCookie::try_from_slice length gate (pd6cv)

Add fuzz_session_cookie_try_from_slice covering try_from_slice
(session.rs:240) and decode_cookie_bytes (session.rs:507). Properties:
length-32 acceptance with bytes preserved verbatim, length-not-32
rejected with InvalidCookieLength carrying the exact rejected length,
wrapper/inner agreement, round-trip identity, JSON + canonical-CBOR
serde round-trips. Once-gated anchors verify boundary lengths
(0, 1, 31, 32, 33, 64).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
